name: Marvell Technology, Inc.
description: Marvell Technology, Inc. is a leading global semiconductor company that specializes in providing data infrastructure technology. The company designs, develops, and sells integrated circuits and other infrastructure components across the data center, enterprise networking, carrier infrastructure, automotive, and consumer markets. Marvell's solutions are essential for moving, storing, processing, and securing the world's data with high speed and efficiency. By focusing on advanced compute, networking, storage, and custom ASIC solutions, Marvell enables the digital transformation of industries and supports the growing demands of artificial intelligence and cloud computing.
